subject: Strange Timepiece — a pocket watch with a ghostly purple eye-like face inside, depicted as a Trainer Item card
description: A circular pocket watch dominates the frame, rendered in silver-gray metallic tones with a glowing purple-pink interior. Inside the watch face, in place of clock numerals, is a single large stylized eye or face — purple and glowing, giving the timepiece an otherworldly or haunted quality. The watch appears closed or semi-open, with a chain visible at the top. The background is a soft lavender-pink gradient that reinforces the psychic or mysterious tone of the item.
foreground: silver pocket watch with glowing purple eye-face interior
